title: Touhou Little Maid: Tasks Addon (Orihime)
description: An addon for Touhou Little Maid: Orihime (Unofficial Fabric port).
body:
# Touhou Little Maid: Advanced Tasks Addon

> This is an **ADDON** for the **Touhou Little Maid: Orihime** Fabric port! It expands your maids' capabilities with several new, highly configurable tasks designed for automation and efficiency. Make your maids smarter and your life easier!

## ✨ Features

This mod adds a collection of new, advanced tasks to your maids, each with a deep configuration screen accessible via **Mod Menu**.

### 🪵 Logging
- Maids will intelligently find and fell entire trees from the lowest block.
- Advanced pathfinding to avoid getting stuck in leaves.
- Supports **Efficiency** and **Unbreaking** enchantments.

### ⛏️ Mining
- Maids will smartly mine entire ore veins, automatically detecting and chaining deepslate variants.
- **Configurable X-Ray mode**: When disabled, maids will use precise raycasting to ensure they only target ores they can actually see.
- Supports tool tier checks, blacklists, and whitelists for full control over what they mine.

### 💧 Water
- Maids will attempt to save you from fall damage with a well-timed water bucket (**Auto-MLG**)!
- Automatically extinguishes fires and places water on lava for you or herself.

### 🧪 Alchemist
- Your maids will now use potions in combat!
- Throws beneficial potions at you and harmful potions at enemies.

### 📦 Organizing
- Maids will sort nearby **chests** and **barrels**.
- **Advanced Sorting Algorithms**:
  - **Item Type**: A new, detailed sorting that groups items by their specific function (swords, pickaxes, food, blocks, etc.).
  - **Category**: A simpler sort for broad categories like "Tools" and "Blocks."
  - **A-Z / Z-A**: Standard alphabetical sorting.
- Features a per-container cooldown to prevent spam and a configurable blacklist.

### 🔥 Fueling
- Maids will automatically refuel your **furnaces**, **smokers**, and **blast furnaces**.
- **Smart Fueling Algorithms**:
  - **Cost Efficiency**: The maid calculates the most efficient fuel to prevent waste, even for fractional amounts (e.g., uses 4 logs for 6 items).
  - **Best/Worst Fuel**: Prioritizes the best or worst fuel types first.
- Includes a "Strictly No Waste" option and blacklists for fuels and smeltable items.

---

## ⚙️ Highly Configurable
> Almost every feature can be tweaked to your exact liking! Use **Mod Menu** to access a detailed in-game configuration screen for each task.

---

## ❗ Requirements
- This mod is an **ADDON** and will not work by itself.
- You **MUST** have the **[Touhou Little Maid: Orihime](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhoulittlemaid-orihime)** Fabric port installed.
